sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9646" key="a)nte/codos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντέξ-οδος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a <sense id="n9646.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">military movement,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰς δι᾽ ἀλλήλων ἀ. καὶ εἰσόδους</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
